message:
fix(scripts): Add || true to arithmetic increments to prevent errexit failures

The arithmetic increment expressions ((TESTS_PASSED++)) etc. return exit
code 1 when the variable is 0 (since 0 is falsy in bash arithmetic).
Under set -e (errexit), this causes the script to exit unexpectedly.

Adding || true ensures the counter increments succeed regardless of the
current value, fixing script termination on the first test result when
counters start at zero.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
